---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

```{=html}
<p style="margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
  <a class="btn-pdf" href="static/uploads/resume.pdf" target="_blank"
     style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4rem;padding:0.45rem 1rem;border-radius:5px;text-decoration:none;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:0.9rem;">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down-fill"></i> Download full CV (PDF)
  </a>
</p>

<!-- CURRENT POSITION -->
<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Current Position</h2>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2024 – present</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>Postdoctoral Researcher</strong>
      <span>IGOP, Universitat Autònoma de Barcelona</span>
      <span>WHOCOUNTS project (ERC Starting Grant, PI: Daniel Edmiston)</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EDUCATION -->
<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Education</h2>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2018 – 2023</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>Ph.D. in Social Psychology</strong>
      <span>University of Granada</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2017 – 2019</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>Master's Degree in Social Problems</strong>
      <span>University of Granada</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2016 – 2017</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>Master's Degree in Psychology of Social Intervention</strong>
      <span>University of Granada</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2012 – 2016</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>Bachelor's Degree in Psychology</strong>
      <span>University of Valencia</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PUBLICATIONS -->
<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Peer-Reviewed Publications</h2>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2026</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>The Distinctive Nature and Effects of Deep Poverty: a Hybrid Case for Minimum Income Schemes</strong>
      <span>Alcañiz-Colomer, J. &amp; Edmiston, D. · <em>Social Indicators Research</em></span>
      <span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s11205-026-03819-7" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.1007/s11205-026-03819-7</a></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2025</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>When those fleeing the war are blue-eyed and blond: The effects of message content and social identity on blatant dehumanization in four nations</strong>
      <span>Çoksan, S., Yaşın-Tekizoğlu, F., Uysal, M.S., Hartwich, L., Alcañiz-Colomer, J. &amp; Loughnan, S. · <em>International Journal of Intercultural Relations</em></span>
      <span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijintrel.2025.102177" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijintrel.2025.102177</a></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2024</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>Socioeconomic status self-deception as a way to perpetuate classist societies</strong>
      <span>Melita, D., Alcañiz-Colomer, J., Matamoros-Lima, J., Ariza Ríos, S. &amp; Moya, M. · <em>Political Psychology</em></span>
      <span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/pops.13051" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.1111/pops.13051</a></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2024</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>Educational level and social attitudes: unraveling patterns and methodological considerations</strong>
      <span>Alcañiz-Colomer, J. &amp; Moya, M. · <em>Psychology, Society &amp; Education</em></span>
      <span><a href="https://doi.org/10.21071/pse.v16i2.17078" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.21071/pse.v16i2.17078</a></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2024</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>Psychometric properties of the Spanish adaptation of the General Phubbing Scale</strong>
      <span>Ruiz, M.J., Herruzo, C. &amp; Alcañiz-Colomer, J. · <em>Revista Latinoamericana de Psicología</em></span>
      <span><a href="https://doi.org/10.14349/rlp.2024.v56.7" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.14349/rlp.2024.v56.7</a></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2023</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>Gendered Social Perceptions of "The Poor": Differences in Individualistic Attributions, Stereotypes, and Attitudes Toward Social Protection Policies</strong>
      <span>Alcañiz-Colomer, J., Moya, M. &amp; Valor-Segura, I. · <em>Sex Roles</em></span>
      <span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s11199-023-01375-9" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.1007/s11199-023-01375-9</a></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2023</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>The different effects of income and educational level on prosocial behaviour and related ideological variables</strong>
      <span>Moya, M. &amp; Alcañiz-Colomer, J. · <em>International Journal of Social Psychology</em></span>
      <span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1080/02134748.2023.2229171" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.1080/02134748.2023.2229171</a></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2023</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>Social justice orientations: Exploring their impact on poverty attributions and support for social protection</strong>
      <span>Alcañiz-Colomer, J., Valor-Segura, I. &amp; Moya, M. · <em>Political Psychology</em></span>
      <span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/pops.12937" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.1111/pops.12937</a></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2023</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>Inhuman animals: moving dehumanization into the domain of human–animal relations</strong>
      <span>Gradidge, S., Alcañiz-Colomer, J. &amp; Loughnan, S. · <em>Current Opinion in Behavioral Sciences</em></span>
      <span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cobeha.2023.101249" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cobeha.2023.101249</a></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-year">2022</div>
    <div class="cv-body">
      <strong>Not all poor are equal: the perpetuation of poverty through blaming those who have been poor all their lives</strong>
      <span>Alcañiz-Colomer, J., Moya, M. &amp; Valor-Segura, I. · <em>Current Psychology</em></span>
      <span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s12144-022-03804-6" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.1007/s12144-022-03804-6</a></span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RESEARCH INTERESTS -->
<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Research Interests</h2>
  <p>Poverty perception and attributions · Social policies and redistribution · Socioeconomic status measurement · Poverty dynamics · Punitive attitudes toward people in poverty · Social class from a psychosocial perspective · Philosophy of science</p>
</div>
```
